title: вЂ‹вЂ‹Letter from the Secretary of State to stakeholders: Next phase of reforms to accelerate growth and housebuildingвЂ‹
body: "вЂ‹вЂ‹On 16 December 2025, the government launched a consultation on a clearer more rules-based National Planning Policy Framework (NPPF) and announced wider measures to accelerateВ growth andВ housing delivery. "
